_comment: Two DIFFERENT HawkSoft enum spaces. DO NOT mix them. See docs/HAWKSOFT_API.md. Unknown values are the literal string "TBD" — never guessed; they require a live capture against a designated test client.

pathA_partnerApi._doc: Sanctioned HawkSoft Partner API v3.0 — what the live logger uses today.
pathA_partnerApi.source: api/hawksoft-logger.js CHANNEL_MAP + HawkSoft Partner API v3.0

noteFormat._doc: VERIFIED 2026-05-18 (production log Row #234): the `note` field accepts the buildHawkSoftNote() HTML dialect and HawkSoft renders it (bold, ul/ol, rgb color, underline) — the guide's 'plain text only' claim is FALSE. The live logger converts plain text → HTML via js/call-logger.js _plainToHawkSoftHtml() on Confirm & Push.

logActionEnum._doc: LogAction codes 1-56 = group base + offset. Group base: Phone 1, Mail 9, Walk In 17, Online 25, Email 33, Text 41, Chat 49. Offset within group: To Insured +0, To Carrier +1, To Agency Staff +2, To 3rd Party +3, From Insured +4, From Carrier +5, From Agency Staff +6, From 3rd Party +7.

callTypeMap._doc: Mirror of api/hawksoft-logger.js CHANNEL_MAP. The CODE is the single source of truth — edit it there, then re-mirror here.

pathB_internalApi._doc: UNSANCTIONED internal cs.hawksoft.app API from the HawkSoft 6 DevTools exploration. NOT wired. Unverified against a live session. Confirmed values are direct observations; everything else is "TBD" pending a live capture.
pathB_internalApi.auth: Ambient session cookies (hstoken, cms) via credentials: 'include' — never read or transmit the token values

tbd._doc: All other action IDs unconfirmed — need a live capture.

noteHtmlDialect._doc: Mirror of the buildHawkSoftNote mapping in js/hawksoft-note.js. Semantic tags (strong/em/p) are stripped by HawkSoft — only these patterns survive.
